title: Europe Forklift Market Report 2026: Surge in Electric, Digital, and Automated Forklifts Propels Growth Amid Sustainability and Efficiency Demands - Opportunity Analysis and Forecast to 2035
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: Europe's forklift market is projected to grow from USD 19.8 billion in 2025 to USD 32.6 billion by 2035 at a 5.2% CAGR, driven by increasing demand for electric, digital, and automated solutions. The shift toward sustainability, operational efficiency, and regulatory compliance is reshaping the market, with electric forklifts capturing 53% market share. Germany leads the region with 24% market share, supported by its advanced industrial ecosystem.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Major forklift manufacturer positioned to benefit from growing market demand and transition toward electric and automated solutions
Major competitor positioned to benefit from market growth of 5.2% CAGR and increasing adoption of electric and automated forklift solutions
Key market player well-positioned to capitalize on the shift toward electric forklifts and digital fleet management technologies
Major player in material handling equipment with growth opportunities in the expanding European forklift market
Market participant positioned to benefit from increasing investments in modern logistics systems and production efficiency

title: HYSTER-YALE DECLARES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND
author: Prnewswire
description: Hyster-Yale, Inc. (NYSE:HY) announced that its Board of Directors increased the regular cash dividend from 36 cents to 36.5 cents per share. The dividend will be paid on June 16, 2026, to stockholders of record as of June 1, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company increased its quarterly dividend from $0.36 to $0.365 per share, demonstrating confidence in financial performance and commitment to returning value to shareholders. Dividend increases are typically viewed as a positive signal of company health and profitability.

title: Electric Forklifts Business Report 2026: $124.33 Bn Market Trends, Opportunities, Competitive Analysis, and Long-term Forecasts, 2020-2025, 2025-2030F, 2035F
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The global electric forklifts market is experiencing robust growth, projected to expand from $72.12 billion in 2025 to $80.42 billion in 2026, with a CAGR of 11.5%, reaching $124.23 billion by 2030. Key growth drivers include e-commerce expansion, warehouse automation, lithium-ion battery adoption, and sustainability mandates. Leading companies are innovating with electric pneumatic forklifts and pursuing strategic acquisitions to strengthen market positions.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Highlighted as a leading company innovating with new electric pneumatic forklifts (48V and 80V models) introduced in November 2023, demonstrating active product development and market leadership.
Listed as a prominent player in the electric forklift market, positioned to benefit from the 11.5% CAGR growth and increasing demand for electric material handling solutions.
Identified as a key market player with exposure to the expanding electric forklift market driven by warehouse automation and e-commerce growth.
Key market player with exposure to growing demand for electric forklifts driven by e-commerce, warehouse expansion, and sustainability mandates.
Listed among leading companies in the electric forklift industry, well-positioned to capitalize on market expansion and lithium-ion battery adoption trends.
Prominent player in the market with strong positioning to benefit from warehouse automation expansion and the shift toward electric material handling equipment.

title: Forklift Truck Business Report 2026: $105.5+ Bn Market Trends, Opportunities, Competitive Analysis, and Long-term Forecasts, 2020-2025, 2025-2030F, 2035F
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The global forklift truck market is experiencing robust growth, expanding from $73.34 billion in 2025 to $78.55 billion in 2026 at a 7.1% CAGR, with projections to reach $105.59 billion by 2030 at 7.7% CAGR. Key growth drivers include rising demand for autonomous and electric forklifts, e-commerce expansion, warehouse automation, and construction sector growth. Asia-Pacific dominates the market, with major innovations in electric pallet trucks and smart fleet management systems.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Major forklift manufacturer positioned to benefit from 7.7% CAGR growth and increasing demand for electric and autonomous forklifts
Leading industrial truck provider actively innovating through partnerships (Eurofork collaboration in October 2024) to enhance warehouse automation and sustainability
Leading forklift manufacturer benefiting from market expansion and increasing adoption of electric and autonomous material handling solutions

title: HYSTER-YALE DECLARES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND
author: Prnewswire
description: Hyster-Yale, Inc. (NYSE:HY) announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.36 per share on both Class A and Class B Common Stock, payable on March 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 27, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company's declaration of a regular quarterly dividend demonstrates financial stability and confidence in cash generation. Dividend payments are generally viewed positively by investors as they represent a return of capital and indicate management's confidence in the company's financial health and future prospects.
